justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, accurately checking for 9am on each specified date.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options or suggesting different times of day.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved multiple avoidable round-trips as the agent repeatedly checked for the exact same time slot on different days without suggesting broader availability.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was frustrating due to the repetitive nature of the agent's responses and its inability to proactively suggest alternative times, leading to a prolonged and unproductive exchange.

overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of checking 9am on consecutive days without offering any other time slots, which made the conversation very inefficient and frustrating for the user.
